title: athanasia pectinata
intro: Athanasia pectinata, also known as Chrysanthemum coronarium, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in the Mediterranean region and used in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of Athanasia pectinata include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Athanasia pectinata is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, particularly those related to the digestive and respiratory systems.
